title: Beyond Brexit—and Back to Europe
content: Those who follow only intergovernmental negotiations or debates in the media might think that nothing has changed in the decade since the United Kingdom's voters decided to leave the European Union. Yet new polling finds that large majorities on both sides of the English Channel now support re-engagement.
snippet: Those who follow only intergovernmental negotiations or debates in the media might think that nothing has changed in the decade since the United Kingdom's voters decided to leave the European Union.
creator: Mark Leonard
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Trump’s March of Folly in Iran
content: In promoting his “deal” with Iran, US President Donald Trump has tried to dress up a humiliating defeat as a victory. While it’s tempting to blame this outcome on incompetent leadership, it stems more from the policies and institutions that have allowed entertainers and profiteers to rise to power.
snippet: In promoting his “deal” with Iran, US President Donald Trump has tried to dress up a humiliating defeat as a victory. While it’s tempting to blame this outcome on incompetent leadership, it stems more
creator: Timothy Snyder
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Alan Greenspan’s Mixed Legacy
content: The longtime Federal Reserve chair inferred from past crises that lightly regulated markets, while prone to excesses, could right themselves sufficiently to avoid imperiling the financial system and the economy. The correct lesson would have been that markets require strict regulation, and that competent technocrats are essential.
snippet: The longtime Federal Reserve chair inferred from past crises that lightly regulated markets, while prone to excesses, could right themselves sufficiently to avoid imperiling the financial system and
creator: Barry Eichengreen
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Will AI Yield Abundance Without Purpose?
content: Work and employment play a uniquely powerful role in structuring people’s days and conferring a sense of belonging, status, and self-worth. Although AI boosters insist that people would organically find new sources of meaning if most jobs are automated, there is no reason to assume so.
snippet: Work and employment play a uniquely powerful role in structuring people’s days and conferring a sense of belonging, status, and self-worth. Although AI boosters insist that people would organically
creator: Carl Benedikt Frey
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: To Avoid Climate Peril, the World Must Electrify
content: The war in the Gulf has unleashed powerful market forces that the rest of the world can harness to accelerate electrification and keep the Paris climate agreement's primary objectives on track. Doing so will not only mitigate climate change, but also strengthen economic resilience worldwide.
snippet: The war in the Gulf has unleashed powerful market forces that the rest of the world can harness to accelerate electrification and keep the Paris climate agreement's primary objectives on track. Doing
creator: Murat Kurum
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: What the Iran War Taught the World About Food Security
content: Perhaps the most unsettling lesson from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is the gap between what we knew and how we prepared. Countries should use whatever easing of immediate pressures occurs to strengthen resilience before the next shock arrives.
snippet: Perhaps the most unsettling lesson from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is the gap between what we knew and how we prepared. Countries should use whatever easing of immediate pressures occurs to
creator: Maximo Torero
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: How (Not) to Conserve Tropical Forests
content: Although the Tropical Forest Forever Facility that emerged from the last United Nations Climate Conference is unlikely to succeed, critically important global conservation efforts are not doomed. Through sustainability-linked sovereign bonds and loans, tropical countries can overcome the TFFF’s fatal flaws.
snippet: Although the Tropical Forest Forever Facility that emerged from the last United Nations Climate Conference is unlikely to succeed, critically important global conservation efforts are not doomed.
creator: Bård Harstad
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Was Brexit Inevitable?
content: If counterfactual history is motivated by a refusal to accept what many have deemed inevitable, it is newly relevant now that the West is marking the tenth anniversary of the Brexit referendum. Even if Britain's fateful choice was caused by deeper structural and historical forces, that does not justify fatalism.
snippet: If counterfactual history is motivated by a refusal to accept what many have deemed inevitable, it is newly relevant now that the West is marking the tenth anniversary of the Brexit referendum. Even
creator: Fabrizio Tassinari
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Questioning the Just War Doctrine
content: With war becoming more frequent and more lethal to civilians, Pope Leo XIV and the College of Cardinals are wading into the debate over its legitimacy. The best outcome of the “consistory” Leo is convening in in late June would be to authorize an overhaul of the just war doctrine for the modern era—and ask the necessary questions.
snippet: With war becoming more frequent and more lethal to civilians, Pope Leo XIV and the College of Cardinals are wading into the debate over its legitimacy. The best outcome of the “consistory” Leo is
creator: Richard Haass
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Bosnia Must Stand on Its Own
content: The Trump administration's recent, apparently corrupt intervention in Bosnia and Herzegovina could have been an opportunity finally to put the country on a path to full independence after more than 30 years of being a ward of the international community. Instead, the vicious cycle of dependence looks set to continue.
snippet: The Trump administration's recent, apparently corrupt intervention in Bosnia and Herzegovina could have been an opportunity finally to put the country on a path to full independence after more than 30
creator: Carl Bildt
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Strategic Logic of the AI Arms Race
content: AI and drones are rapidly transforming warfare, shifting military power toward countries that can combine manufacturing scale, advanced AI systems, and battlefield data. The United States and Europe, hobbled by political dysfunction and obsolete military structures, remain dangerously unprepared.
snippet: AI and drones are rapidly transforming warfare, shifting military power toward countries that can combine manufacturing scale, advanced AI systems, and battlefield data. The United States and Europe,
creator: Charles Ferguson
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Meaning of Limited Government—Then and Now
content: In 1776, Adam Smith and America’s founders envisioned an economy that allowed individuals to pursue their own material well-being, with minimal government intervention. Today, America’s Republican Party claims to be committed to restoring that laissez-faire ideal, even as they make a mockery of its animating principles.
snippet: In 1776, Adam Smith and America’s founders envisioned an economy that allowed individuals to pursue their own material well-being, with minimal government intervention. Today, America’s Republican
creator: Jeffrey Frankel
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: AI Sovereignty Is About Options, Not Ownership
content: The US government’s abrupt decision to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models clarifies what “AI sovereignty” is really about. In the emerging AI economy, competitive advantage will come not from owning a single model, but from being able to evaluate, select, and orchestrate many models.
snippet: The US government’s abrupt decision to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models clarifies what “AI sovereignty” is really about. In the emerging AI economy, competitive
creator: Ren Ito
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Promise and Peril of AGI
content: Artificial general intelligence could dramatically increase human prosperity and free people from countless mundane tasks. But unless its benefits and ownership are broadly shared, it could deprive billions of workers of their livelihoods and pave the way for a new form of techno-authoritarianism.
snippet: Artificial general intelligence could dramatically increase human prosperity and free people from countless mundane tasks. But unless its benefits and ownership are broadly shared, it could deprive
creator: Kaushik Basu
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Reversing Brexit Is Labour’s Best Hope
content: When it comes to the relationship between the United Kingdom and the European Union, political expediency and economic logic both point in the same direction. A majority of British voters now believe that Brexit was a mistake, and they are looking for a leader who will put the issue back on the national agenda.

creator: Anatole Kaletsky
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Global Health Reform Must Bolster Innovation
content: As funding falls for global public health, calls for a country-led system have grown louder. Such reforms are necessary, but they must not come at the expense of new vaccines, medicines, and diagnostics, which can be delivered by strengthening mechanisms—such as product development partnerships—that already work.

creator: Manica Balasegaram
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Learning from the Right Sovereign Wealth Funds
content: The Gulf has made establishing a sovereign wealth fund seem like a strategic—and glamorous—choice, leading countries like Canada to launch their own. But Latin America has run this experiment many times over the years, offering a more realistic view of an SWF’s pitfalls and promise.
snippet: The Gulf has made establishing a sovereign wealth fund seem like a strategic—and glamorous—choice, leading countries like Canada to launch their own. But Latin America has run this experiment many
creator: Erika Mouynes
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Europe Cannot Afford Another Lost Year
content: European businesses need simpler rules, faster permitting, affordable energy, stronger infrastructure, and a fully functioning single market. The longer that European policymakers fail to deliver on these policies, the greater Europe’s competitiveness challenge will become.
snippet: European businesses need simpler rules, faster permitting, affordable energy, stronger infrastructure, and a fully functioning single market. The longer that European policymakers fail to deliver on
creator: Lars Sandahl Sørensen
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: White House Fight Night
content: The venue on the South Lawn for UFC Freedom 250 was built, approved, lit, filmed, defended, watched, and enjoyed as part of a celebration of freedom. President Donald Trump’s chosen object to represent that celebration was a cage.
snippet: The venue on the South Lawn for UFC Freedom 250 was built, approved, lit, filmed, defended, watched, and enjoyed as part of a celebration of freedom. President Donald Trump’s chosen object to
creator: Grzegorz Kwiatkowski

title: The US-Iran Agreement Is a First Step
content: While the recently announced US-Iranian memorandum of understanding is certainly good news, it is not definitive. The path from a statement of diplomatic intent to a fully restored, non-inflationary energy supply chain is fraught with political, technical, and physical risks.
snippet: While the recently announced US-Iranian memorandum of understanding is certainly good news, it is not definitive. The path from a statement of diplomatic intent to a fully restored, non-inflationary
creator: Mohamed A. El-Erian
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The Microfinance Debate Is Missing the Point
content: For too long, policymakers, economists, and investors have focused on whether microfinance actually helps people, reducing a complex issue to a meaningless yes-or-no verdict. The most important questions concern how loans are designed, delivered, and regulated, who receives them, and what they are used for.

creator: Sophie Sirtaine
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: Turning Latin America’s Resilience Into Growth
content: Economic stabilization has been a significant achievement for Latin America and the Caribbean, a region with a long history of financial crises. But these countries need a well-sequenced reform agenda to attract private investment and create the growth engine that will translate hard-won gains into higher living standards.
snippet: Economic stabilization has been a significant achievement for Latin America and the Caribbean, a region with a long history of financial crises. But these countries need a well-sequenced reform agenda
creator: Ilan Goldfajn
sourceDescription: Project Syndicate - The World’s Opinion Page

title: The World Cup vs. the Extremists
content: Germany’s 2026 World Cup team, like so many others in the tournament, shows that loving one’s country and welcoming newcomers are not incompatible impulses. Although activists on the far left and the far right would have us believe otherwise, most ordinary people implicitly recognize this.

creator: Daron Acemoglu

title: The Orange Bandit
content: According to the Roman Emperor Tiberius, a ruler can either “shear the sheep” for many years, by encouraging productive activity from which to generate tax revenues, or he can “skin them alive” just once. By brazenly using the US government to pillage the country, President Donald Trump has apparently chosen the knife.

creator: Aziz Huq
